one.a: No, you buy only when you want. There is no recurring subscription.

two.a: Yes! You choose the book you want, and we build the perfect cozy experience around it.

three.q: Why do I need to fill out a form?
three.a: The final price depends on your chosen book and shipping destination. We calculate a personalized price for you.

four.q: Can I buy it as a gift?
four.a: Absolutely! FantasyBox is designed to be the perfect gift for book lovers.
